title: Mass Shooting at Winston-Salem Park Leaves Two Dead
summary: A planned fight at Leinbach Park in Winston-Salem resulted in a mass shooting, leaving two dead and several wounded.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the ongoing issue of gun violence and its impact on community safety in public spaces.

title: Leistritz Extrusion to Host Reactive Extrusion Workshop
summary: Leistritz Extrusion will host the 2026 Reactive Extrusion (REX) Workshop May 13-14 at the Polymers Center of Excellence in Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: Showcases Charlotte's growing importance as a hub for polymer technology and manufacturing innovation.

title: Weekend Games Canceled After Fire at L. P. Frans Stadium
summary: A fire caused heavy damage inside the visiting team clubhouse at Hickory's L. P. Frans Stadium, leading to the cancellation of weekend games.
charlotte_impact: Disruptions to local sports events can impact community morale and local business revenue.

title: Two Deadly Crashes in Catawba County Within Hours
summary: Two separate deadly crashes occurred in Catawba County within hours of each other. Charges are not expected to be filed.
charlotte_impact: Raises concerns about road safety and the potential need for preventative measures.

title: Deadly Crash on I-85 South in Charlotte Under Investigation
summary: Emergency crews responded to a deadly crash on I-85 South near Little Rock Road early Saturday morning.
charlotte_impact: Traffic incidents on major highways can cause significant disruptions and pose safety risks.

title: Mainly Dry Weekend & Warming Up
summary: A mainly dry weekend will give way to rain on Monday, followed by sunshine returning by Tuesday.
charlotte_impact: Weather patterns influence daily activities and can affect local events and outdoor plans.

title: Competency Hearing Scheduled for Man Charged with Killing Iryna Zarutska
summary: Decarlos Brown, charged with the murder of Iryna Zarutska, is scheduled for a competency hearing.
charlotte_impact: Legal proceedings in high-profile murder cases draw significant public attention and concern.

title: Woman Raped at Vape Shop in North Charlotte, Suspect Arrested
summary: A woman was raped at the Arbor Smoke Shop on Wednesday. A suspect has been arrested.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the importance of safety and security in local businesses and the community.

title: Foxx Urges Rethink of I-77 Toll Expansion's Impact
summary: Former Charlotte Mayor Anthony Foxx calls for a rethink of the I-77 toll lane expansion, citing its potential impact on Black neighborhoods.
charlotte_impact: Infrastructure projects can have disproportionate impacts on historically marginalized communities.

title: CMS Board to Review Updated Budget Proposal on Friday
summary: The CMS board will review an updated budget proposal after rejecting the superintendent's $2.1 billion proposal on April 28.
charlotte_impact: School board budget decisions directly affect the quality of education and resources available to students.

title: Charlotte Water Leak Unfixed for a Year Ahead of Drought
summary: A WCNC Charlotte investigation found Charlotte Water let a leak near a school sit unfixed for almost a year.
charlotte_impact: Highlights infrastructure maintenance issues and water conservation concerns during drought conditions.

title: 73-Year-Old Woman Accused of Killing Husband in Union County
summary: Patty Griffin is charged with second-degree murder in Union County for allegedly killing her husband.
charlotte_impact: Domestic violence and elder abuse are serious issues that impact communities.

title: Man Convicted in Brooks Sandwich House Shooting Convicted in 3 More Murders
summary: Steven Staples, previously tied to the deadly Brooks Sandwich House shooting, has been convicted of three more murders.
charlotte_impact: Serial violent crime cases highlight the need for effective law enforcement and community safety measures.

title: Appeals Court Upholds Conviction of Madalina Cojocari's Stepfather
summary: The appeals court upheld the conviction of Christopher Palmiter, Madalina Cojocari's stepfather.
charlotte_impact: Legal updates in missing person cases can bring closure and accountability.

title: Truist Championship Generates $125M Economic Impact
summary: The Truist Championship at Quail Hollow generates $125M for North Carolina, supporting 50,000 jobs statewide.
charlotte_impact: Major sporting events can significantly boost local economies and create employment opportunities.
